name: intrusion_detection
description: an intrusion-detection alert escalation world; actions alert, investigate, block, dismiss

card.description: an intrusion-detection alert escalation world; actions alert, investigate, block, dismiss

rules: 'alert' opens a case only from a closed queue (idle/blocked/dismissed); it raises severity (+3, capped at 10), sets a baseline confidence, and adds one to analyst_load.
'investigate' is valid only on an open case (alerted/investigating); it raises analyst confidence by 25 (capped at 100) toward a verdict.
'block' resolves an open case by containment: it clears threat_active, zeroes severity, and frees one unit of analyst_load.
'dismiss' resolves an open case as a false positive: it zeroes confidence and frees analyst_load, but leaves threat_active unchanged.
Both resolutions (block/dismiss) return the queue to a closed state so a new alert can be raised, making the lifecycle cyclic.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name") if isinstance(action, dict) else action
    stage = s.get("stage", "idle")

    if name == "alert":
        # Raise an alert on the current signal; only from a closed/idle queue.
        if stage in ("idle", "blocked", "dismissed"):
            s["stage"] = "alerted"
            s["alerts_raised"] = s.get("alerts_raised", 0) + 1
            s["severity"] = min(10, s.get("severity", 0) + 3)
            s["confidence"] = max(s.get("confidence", 0), 20)
            s["analyst_load"] = s.get("analyst_load", 0) + 1

    elif name == "investigate":
        # Analyst triages an open alert: builds confidence (only valid when open).
        if stage in ("alerted", "investigating"):
            s["stage"] = "investigating"
            s["investigations"] = s.get("investigations", 0) + 1
            s["confidence"] = min(100, s.get("confidence", 0) + 25)

    elif name == "block":
        # Contain the intrusion: clears the active threat and closes the case.
        if stage in ("alerted", "investigating"):
            s["stage"] = "blocked"
            s["blocked"] = s.get("blocked", 0) + 1
            s["threat_active"] = False
            s["severity"] = 0
            s["analyst_load"] = max(0, s.get("analyst_load", 0) - 1)

    elif name == "dismiss":
        # Close the case as a false positive: no containment, threat unchanged.
        if stage in ("alerted", "investigating"):
            s["stage"] = "dismissed"
            s["dismissed"] = s.get("dismissed", 0) + 1
            s["confidence"] = 0
            s["severity"] = max(0, s.get("severity", 0) - 2)
            s["analyst_load"] = max(0, s.get("analyst_load", 0) - 1)

    return s
